subject: Live Musician — Sunset Sessions & Ambient | Summer 2026
body_html:
Hi,

I'm Flutur — a solo live act based in Italy. RAV Vast, live looping, acoustic guitar. I create ambient and sunset sessions for hotels and venues.

I had a 4-year residency at a boutique hotel on Lake Maggiore, so I know what it means to play for guests every evening — reading the room, adapting the energy, being invisible when needed and present when it matters.

My setup is fully autonomous — no sound engineer, no band, just me and the instruments. I can go from meditation-quiet to dance-floor energy depending on what the evening needs.

Here's a short clip that shows the sound better than I can describe it:
→ Sunset session — RAV Vast

I'm looking for summer 2026 placements in Greece. If this could be a fit for any of your hotel partners, I'd love to have a conversation.

Best,
Alessio
linktr.ee/flutur
design_notes: ONE video link, not five. Let them ask for more.
No bullet point credentials list. The residency speaks for itself.
Name is Alessio, not 'Flutur' — more professional with an agency.
'Reading the room' = shows you understand hospitality, not just music.
'Invisible when needed' = exactly what hotels want to hear.
GGT is NOT mentioned. It comes out in conversation IF they ask.
No rate, no pressured CTA. Just 'I'd love to have a conversation.'
Short. Under 150 words. Respects their time.

follow_up_plan.if_no_reply_7_days: Short follow-up with a DIFFERENT video (Efthymia for spa context)
follow_up_plan.if_no_reply_14_days: LinkedIn message to Victoria Papadopoulou — not the same email, a personal note
